headline: Is Trade Desk’s (TTD) Board Shakeup Reframing Its Edge In An AI-Driven Ad Market?
summary: In early April 2026, The Trade Desk announced that long-serving director Lise J. Buyer resigned from its board, following a broader period of management scrutiny and industry debate over platform fees and competition. At the same time, analysts highlighted both the company’s strong recent operating performance and mounting pressures from fee scrutiny, AI-native rivals, and large tech competitors, underscoring how governance changes intersect with evolving risks in the digital advertising...

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Oracle, Oklo, Gevo — And Markets Close At Record Highs
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.
